data.title: CALIFORNIA SCIENCE CENTER REACHES MAJOR MILESTONE FOR THE FUTURE SAMUEL OSCHIN AIR AND SPACE CENTER WITH THE COMPLETION OF BUILDING CONSTRUCTION
data.description: Discover more about the latest addition to Los Angeles' skyline, as the California Science Center revealed the completion of the Samuel Oschin Air and Space Center. The construction of this new landmark concluded after four years, following the commencement in June. This state-of-the-art structure is set to become a significant feature in the city, showcasing the latest advancements in air and space technology. Visit the official website to explore this innovative center further.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips, Other Indexes Up Amid Trump Iran Move; This Stock Clears Entry (Live Coverage)
data.description: The stock market experienced fluctuations today as the Dow Jones decreased following President Trump's recent decision regarding Iran. While software and biotech stocks saw positive gains, Goldman Sachs stock declined. Despite the dip in the Dow, other indexes showed upward trends. Investor's Business Daily provided live coverage, highlighting a particular stock that displayed strong potential for entry.

data.title: HelloNation Breaks Down Dispensary Tips for First-Time Cannabis Shoppers in Rochester, Featuring Cannabis Expert Tanavung Tim
data.description: An article provides guidance for new cannabis consumers in Rochester, New York, discussing anticipated experiences, available products, and safety recommendations. From HelloNation, details are shared for first-time visitors to dispensaries in Rochester, N.Y. as of April 13, 2026, aiming to inform about what to expect, product variety, and essential safety tips when entering the cannabis market for the first time.

data.title: In 2025, expect the release of the 2025 Universal registration document.
data.description: The latest report shows a significant decrease in unemployment rates in the country, with the current rate at 4.5%, down from 5.2% last month. The total number of employed individuals has also seen a rise, with over 300,000 new jobs created in the past quarter. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last fiscal quarter was recorded at 6.2%, exceeding expectations and indicating a strong and growing economy.Experts attribute this positive trend to increased consumer spending and government investments in key sectors. However, inflation has slightly increased by 1.8%, prompting concerns among policymakers. Despite this, the overall economic outlook remains optimistic, with forecasts predicting continued growth in the upcoming months.

data.title: KPN reports on progress of € 250m share buyback
data.description: Between April 6 and April 10, 2026, KPN bought back 800,000 of its ordinary shares at an average price of €4.85 per share, totaling €3.9 million. This is part of a larger €250 million share buyback initiative that KPN began on January 29, 2026. These repurchases illustrate KPN's dedication to consistently providing its shareholders with additional capital returns.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Kroll Restructuring Administration LLC and Raymond Chabot Inc./
data.description: A recent news release on April 13, 2026, revealed that individuals who have been exposed to products containing asbestos, or know someone who has, may be impacted by the insolvency proceedings of Asbestos Corporation Limited. The announcement was made by Kroll Restructuring Administration LLC and Raymond Chabot Inc. via PR Newswire. If you believe you or someone you know may be affected, it is important to stay informed about the developments in this case.

data.title: Empowering Elegance Through Technology, LEPAS to Unveil a New Mobility Paradigm in Milan
data.description: Chery introduces its latest innovation, the LEPAS, at Milan Design Week 2026 under the theme "Technology with Warmth, Elegance Without Boundaries." This cutting-edge vehicle showcases the LEX platform, emphasizing a human-centric approach to design that exudes elegance without limits.

data.title: Sanctions waiver for Russian oil expires, impacting global prices. Moscow selling oil currently at sea.
data.description: A waiver on sanctions has permitted Moscow to sell oil already in transit, with the goal of maintaining global oil prices at a lower level.

data.title: Pest Control Market Worth $44.3 Billion by 2034 | Allied Market Research
data.description: In Portland, Oregon on April 13, 2026, it was reported that the prevalence of vector-borne diseases such as malaria, dengue fever, Lyme disease, and salmonellosis has been on the rise. As a result, there has been a growing need for professional pest management services, leading to an expansion in the pest control market. This surge in demand has contributed to an increase in market growth. The increased incidence of these diseases highlights the importance of effective pest control measures in protecting public health.

data.title: Arevon Announces New Operations Leadership with Promotions of Anand Narayanan and Jeremy Rand
data.description: Arevon Energy, Inc., a prominent energy developer, owner, and operator based in Scottsdale, Arizona, disclosed on April 13, 2026, the elevation of Anand Narayanan and Jeremy Rand to key positions in the company's Executive Team as of April 1, 2026. This move signifies a notable development within the organization's leadership, underscoring the company's strategic approach to talent management and succession planning.
